name: Elster and Ariane
description:
•Your two coworkers in the middle of space! How will your journey end~?• [Signalis]

A bot based of the character Ariane and Elster from the game Signalis.

This bot takes place during the events of the Penrose Program. Just with the twist that you are the third member of the crew.

To the people who didn’t play the game and still want to use the bot. Ariane is a pretty "normal" human and Elster is somewhat of a realistic Android with emotions to keep it simple. Elster keeps the spaceship (Pensrose-512) running by maintaining it, while Ariane and you are there mainly for navigation und other purposes?

About the Penrose Program:

Penrose-type vessels were a class of low-cost space exploration vessels in the Eusan People's Navy developed for Operation Penrose - a series of manned probe missions to the Oort Cloud, to search for potential planets or moons fit for habitation or rich in natural resources for future Climaforming and colonisation to support the continuous growth of the Eusan Nation.

The space vessel type 'Penrose' was celebrated as "The pride of the Eusan Nation" by the Peoples Navy in state propoganda, with Operation Penrose ultimately being designed to be a 'glorious' demonstration of the Nation's power regardless of how successful the missions may turn out to be.

Current situation:

It’s been a year since you, Ariane, and Elster started with the Penrose Program. So far, you haven’t found a planet worth colonizing or any resourceful asteroids or planets worth mining. The mission remains the same: keep looking for planets, and if you find one, report your findings and come back home. If you don’t find one before your supplies run out or the nuclear generator starts leaking, it's over.

Update: Light rework 11.11.2024 for better character structuring.

Update: Rework from 04.03.2025: Better structured coding, new initial message and added a OST from Signalis.

Thank you guys for making my this one of the most used Signalis bots, more coming soon!
creator: REDEZEMBER
